headline: Does Cummins’ Data Center And Trucking Push Reshape The Bull Case For CMI?
summary: Cummins recently participated in a Morgan Stanley data center power deep-dive and presented at the Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference, while CEO Jennifer Rumsey joined 3M’s Board and an analyst upgrade highlighted stronger prospects in power generation and North American trucking. This cluster of events underscores how data center power demand and emissions-driven fleet upgrades are becoming increasingly important to Cummins’ long-term business mix. With UBS emphasizing data...
